title: NIT Karnataka Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Project Associate Posts
description: National Institute of Technology Karnataka Surathkal (NIT Karnataka) has declared the official notification for the recruitment of Project Associate Jobs. Candidates who have completed their B.E/ B.Tech, M.E/ M.Tech in Civil Engineering or Mining Engineering can grab this chance and apply for the NIT Karnataka Notification 2026 . Here we have included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligib...
